stories.title: Market Classifier v2 — 25+ categories
acceptanceCriteria: backend/core/market_classifier.py exists with classify_market(title, slug, event_slug, tags) function
Returns BTC_5m for 'Bitcoin Up or Down - 5m window'
Returns Entertainment_Music for 'Taylor Swift album release'
Returns Finance for 'Fed rate cut June 2026'
All 25+ categories from PROMPT.md spec are covered

stories.title: Proxy Finder — EOA to Polymarket proxy wallet resolution
acceptanceCriteria: Method A: Blockscout PUSD MINT event lookup (PUSD=0xC011a7E12a19f7B1f670d46F03B03f3342E82DFB)
Method B: Polymarket profile __NEXT_DATA__ parsing fallback
Caching: results cached to data/proxy_cache/ with 24h TTL
Rate limiting: 100ms delay between Blockscout requests
Returns None with status when no proxy found
Handles edge cases: no PUSD transfers, multiple proxies, contract wallets
backend/tests/test_proxy_finder.py has 3+ test cases with mocked API responses

stories.title: Wallet Resolver — any input to wallet info
acceptanceCriteria: WalletInfo dataclass has: eoa, proxy, username, method, is_proxy, has_traded
Accepts @username and bare username (fetches profile page)
Chains: username -> profile -> EOA+proxy | EOA -> proxy_finder -> proxy

stories.title: Wallet History — fetch positions with pagination and caching
acceptanceCriteria: get_all_closed_positions(proxy_wallet, force_refresh) fetches via Data API with offset pagination (0,50,100...)
get_pnl_history(proxy_wallet) returns PnLHistory with peak, min, current, max_drawdown, recovery_count
Handles empty wallet gracefully (returns empty lists, not errors)
backend/tests/test_wallet_history.py has 5+ test cases with mocked API

stories.title: Wallet Analyzer — full PnL, WR, Sharpe, strategy analysis
acceptanceCriteria: analyze_wallet(proxy_wallet) returns WalletAnalysis with all metric fields
Metrics: win_rate, wins, losses, avg_win, avg_loss, profit_factor, expected_value, sharpe_ratio, max_drawdown, recovery_factor
Category breakdown: per-category PnL and WR using market_classifier
Temporal analysis: hourly, daily, monthly performance
Size analysis: avg/median/min/max position, size brackets
Verdict: PROFITABLE / BREAK-EVEN / LOSING based on total_pnl
Red flags list populated based on analysis

stories.title: Position Sizer — standalone Kelly + sizing module
acceptanceCriteria: kelly_criterion(win_rate, avg_win, avg_loss) returns quarter-Kelly fraction
Kelly test: WR=0.55, avg_win=1.2, avg_loss=1.0 -> f*=0.1, quarter=0.025
calculate_position_size(capital, confidence, market_liquidity, max_slippage) returns USD size

stories.title: Exposure Limits — pre-trade validation checklist
acceptanceCriteria: Checks: capital available, position limit, market limit, category limit, daily loss, trading hours
Returns (False, reason) when any limit exceeded

stories.title: Sanity Checks — pre-trade market validation
acceptanceCriteria: Rejects: expired market, thin book (<$100), wide spread (>5c), no recent trades
Checks: wallet active in last 7d, recent performance, no strategy drift

stories.title: Strategy Fingerprint — 14-dimension profiling
acceptanceCriteria: strategy_fingerprint(positions) returns StrategyFingerprint with all 14 dimensions

Dimensions: category_preference, position_sizing, entry_timing, hold_duration, win_rate_analysis, profit_factor_decomposition, risk_profile, outcome_preference, price_sensitivity, entry_strategy, exit_strategy, event_responsiveness, capital_management, pattern_reproducibility
Red flags: small sample, lucky trade, strategy drift
Green flags: consistent WR, low drawdown, replicable

stories.title: Wallet Scanner — profitable trader discovery
acceptanceCriteria: find_profitable_traders(min_volume, min_trades, max_results, sort_by) returns list
Discovery methods: Gamma API participants, Blockscout whale tracking, leaderboard, known wallets
Pipeline: collect -> deduplicate -> find proxy -> rapid analysis -> rank
Sort by pnl, win_rate, sharpe, volume all work

stories.title: Opportunity Detector — multi-type opportunity scanning
acceptanceCriteria: Each opportunity has: type, market, expected_value, confidence, entry_price, target_price, stop_loss
Integrates with existing arb_executor and probability_arb modules

stories.title: Strategy Replication — extract decision logic from profitable wallets
acceptanceCriteria: Confidence score based on rule validation

stories.title: Trade Journal v2 — dedicated journal class with export
acceptanceCriteria: TradeJournal class wraps existing DB models
get_daily_summary(date) returns total_trades, pnl, win_rate, best/worst trade
export_csv() writes to file and returns path

stories.title: CLI Integration — wire all modules into CLI
acceptanceCriteria: Commands: analyze, compare, scan, fingerprint, replicate, resolve, proxy, opportunities, journal
All commands have --json flag for machine output

stories.title: Full regression — all new tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: All 14 new test files pass with 0 failures
No import errors in new modules

New modules importable: backend.core.market_classifier, backend.core.proxy_finder, backend.core.wallet_resolver, backend.data.wallet_history, backend.core.wallet_analyzer, backend.core.risk.position_sizer, backend.core.risk.exposure_limits, backend.core.risk.sanity_checks, backend.strategies.fingerprint, backend.core.wallet_scanner, backend.strategies.opportunity_detector, backend.strategies.replication, backend.monitoring.trade_journal, backend.cli
